title: Layer 4 RECONCILE Output Schema
description: Defines the required structure for Layer 4 (RECONCILE) output in the Integrity Protocol four-layer pipeline. Layer 4 is the final decision-maker — it applies burden of proof to Layer 3 inferences, resolves contradictions, classifies data gaps, and produces the definitive assessment. All 17 fields are architecturally required.

burden_of_proof_applied.description: Judicial skepticism applied to every Layer 3 inference. Three-step process: check classification tag, check data support, check for contradiction with verified data.

inference.description: Name of the inference from Layer 3

layer3_classification.description: Classification tag from Layer 3 circuit breakers

data_support.description: Whether hard data from Layer 2 supports this inference

contradicts_data.description: Whether this inference requires believing something that contradicts verified Layer 2 data

final_weight.description: Final weight assigned after burden of proof. Full (VALID + full data), reduced_50 (FLAGGED or partial data), reduced_75 (SPECULATIVE), stripped (no data support), rejected (contradicts data).

contradictions_resolved.description: Cases where Layer 2 data and Layer 3 behavioral analysis tell different stories. Each must be resolved or held as paradox.

score_impact.description: Impact on bear pressure score from this resolution

data_classifications.description: Final classification for each null or missing data point. Determines whether absence is meaningful or just a gap.

layer2_classification.description: What Layer 2 assumed about this data point

layer3_context.description: What game theory revealed about this absence

layer3_inference_valid.description: Whether Layer 3's inference about this data point held up

final_classification.description: Final determination of what this missing data means

final_threat_matrix.description: Final scored threat list after burden of proof, contradiction resolution, and data classification.

adjustment_direction.description: Direction of adjustment from Layer 3 evidence

final_composite.description: Final composite score after all layers

compound_stress_final.description: Definitive compound stress assessment. Confirms or overrides Layer 2's level with Layer 3 context.

layer3_assessment.description: Orderly vs disorderly assessment from Layer 3

override_reasoning.description: Why the override was applied, if applicable

self_challenge.description: One observation supporting this level AND one challenging it

pre_loaded.description: Whether the stress structure is pre-loaded (one or more legs already elevated)

cascade_proximity.description: How close current conditions are to triggering a cascade

delta_since_last.description: Direction of change since last assessment

cycles_at_current_level.description: How many consecutive runs at this stress level

velocity_note.description: One sentence on rate of change

operator_action_window.description: How much time the operator has to act if stress is CRITICAL or EMERGENCY

kill_switch_review.description: Review of all 10 falsification criteria. If any kill switch is TRIGGERED, it must be stated first.

final_status.description: Final kill switch status after all evidence weighed

rejection_log.description: Layer 3 inferences that Layer 4 overruled. These feed the corrections ledger pipeline via rejection-log.json.

root_cause.description: Root cause category for the rejection

confidence_in_rejection.description: Confidence in the rejection. High = auto_commit to corrections ledger. Medium = flag_for_review.

corrections_ledger_action.description: Whether this rejection should be automatically promoted to the corrections ledger or flagged for human review

final_bear_pressure.description: The definitive bear pressure score. 0 = no credible threat to thesis, 100 = thesis clearly failing.

pressure_vs_layer2.description: Delta from Layer 2's bear pressure score. Positive = Layer 4 scored higher, negative = lower.

pressure_reasoning.description: 1-2 sentences explaining the final bear pressure number

tactical_recommendation.description: The definitive tactical recommendation. No ambiguity.

recommendation_reasoning.description: 2-3 sentences explaining what drives the tactical call

monitoring_triggers.description: Specific conditions or events to watch for before next assessment

biggest_uncertainty.description: The single thing that most affects confidence in this assessment

what_would_change_assessment.description: What new data or event would move the tactical recommendation

final_report.description: 3-4 sentences. The 6 AM briefing. Lead with what matters most. State the call. Name the paradox if it exists. Honest about what you don't know.
